meaning: n.电影院；电影
example: We go to the cinema to watch movies on weekends.
translation: 我们周末去电影院看电影。

meaning: phrase.大声呼喊
example: The girl cried out when she saw the snake.
translation: 女孩看到蛇时大声呼喊。

meaning: prep.在......期间
example: We play games during our break time.
translation: 我们在休息时间玩游戏。

meaning: n.练习；锻炼；活动；运动；行使 v.运用；使用；锻炼 ；使担忧
example: I do exercise every morning to stay healthy.
translation: 我每天早上做运动保持健康。

meaning: phrase.相处
example: I get along well with my classmates.
translation: 我和同学们相处得很好。

meaning: n.成绩等级，评分等级；年级；级别 v.分等级；给......评 分
example: I got a good grade in my math test.
translation: 我在数学测试中取得了好成绩。

meaning: adj.左边的 v.离开；leave的过去式和过去分词 n.左；左 边 adv.向左；在左边
example: Turn left at the traffic light to get to the school.
translation: 在红绿灯处左转去学校。

meaning: n.计划；打算 v.计划；打算
example: We make a plan for our summer vacation.
translation: 我们为暑假制定计划。

meaning: adv.如此；这样；（表示大小或数量）这么，那么；很 ；也 conj.所以
example: It was raining, so we stayed at home.
translation: 下雨了，所以我们待在家里。

meaning: v.花（时间）；花费（金钱时间等）；度过
example: I spend an hour doing my homework every day.
translation: 我每天花一小时做作业。

meaning: n.超市；超级市场
example: My mom buys groceries at the supermarket.
translation: 我妈妈在超市买杂货。

meaning: phra.没关系。/不要紧。
example: A: I'm sorry. B: That's all right.
translation: A: 对不起。B: 没关系。

meaning: phra.好的。不用谢。
example: A: Thank you. B: That's OK.
translation: A: 谢谢。B: 不用谢。

meaning: n.旅行；旅程 v.绊倒；出差错；轻快地走
example: We had a wonderful trip to the beach last summer.
translation: 去年夏天我们去海滩旅行很愉快。

meaning: phrase.打开；开启；接通；使兴奋；使感兴趣
example: Please turn on the light when it gets dark.
translation: 天黑时请打开灯。

meaning: v.行为，行动，动作，举动；表演；演戏；扮演（⻆色） n.行动；装模作样；（戏）幕；法令
example: The students act in a play for the school festival.
translation: 学生们在学校节日上表演戏剧。

meaning: prep.在之前；靠近；在旁边；乘（汽⻋火⻋等）；（表 示方式，如乘⻋等）；通过；按照 adv.经过
example: I go to school by bus every day.
translation: 我每天乘公交车上学。

meaning: n.（dialog）对话；对白
example: We practice dialogue in our English class.
translation: 我们在英语课上练习对话。

meaning: n.戏；剧；戏剧；戏剧表演；戏剧事件
example: The school drama club puts on a play every year.
translation: 学校戏剧俱乐部每年上演一出戏。

meaning: n.迷；狂热爱好者；粉丝；扇子；电⻛扇 v.煽动；吹拂
example: I am a big fan of the football team.
translation: 我是这支足球队的忠实粉丝。

meaning: n.法语；法国人 adj.法国的；法国人的；法语的
example: I learn French as a foreign language.
translation: 我学习法语作为外语。

meaning: n.地理；地理学
example: We study geography to learn about different countries.
translation: 我们学习地理了解不同的国家。

meaning: n.历史；历史学
example: I like history because I enjoy learning about the past.
translation: 我喜欢历史，因为我喜欢了解过去。

meaning: abbr.信息与通信技术（学科 ）；informationandcommunicationstechnology的 缩写
example: We learn about computers in our ICT class.
translation: 我们在信息与通信技术课上学习计算机。

meaning: n.语言
example: English is an important international language.
translation: 英语是一种重要的国际语言。

meaning: adj.友好的；亲切的；讨人喜欢...；令人愉快的；美好的
example: My teacher is very nice to all the students.
translation: 我的老师对所有学生都很友好。

meaning: v.玩；玩耍；演奏；扮演；播放 n.戏，戏剧，演出；剧本 ；比赛
example: We play basketball after school every day.
translation: 我们每天放学后打篮球。

meaning: n.流行音乐；流行乐曲；砰的一声；汽水 v.发出砰的一声 ；突然地行动 adj.流行的；通俗的 adv.砰地
example: I like listening to pop music with my friends.
translation: 我喜欢和朋友一起听流行音乐。

meaning: n.南部；南方；南⻛；南 adj.南（方）的；向南的；从南 来的 adv.在南方；向南方；自南方
example: The sun rises in the east and sets in the south.
translation: 太阳从东方升起，在南方落下。

meaning: adv.到处；向各处；在附近；环绕；大约 prep.在......周 围；环绕；围绕
example: We walk around the park after dinner.
translation: 我们晚饭后在公园周围散步。

meaning: phrase.当时；此刻；现在
example: I am doing my homework at the moment.
translation: 我此刻正在做作业。

meaning: n.建筑物；房子，楼房 v.建筑；build的现在分词
example: The new building in our school is very modern.
translation: 我们学校的新建筑非常现代化。

meaning: adj.忙，忙碌的，忙于(做某事)
example: My mom is always busy with her work.
translation: 我妈妈总是忙于她的工作。

meaning: n.首都；首府；国都；大写字母；财富 adj.大写的
example: Beijing is the capital of China.
translation: 北京是中国的首都。

meaning: n.文化，文明；培养
example: We learn about Chinese culture in our class.
translation: 我们在课堂上学习中国文化。

meaning: n.方向；方位；趋势，(常用复数)指示，用法，说明(书)
example: Can you tell me the direction to the library?
translation: 你能告诉我去图书馆的方向吗？

meaning: adj.东方的；东部的，东边的；从向东来的 adv.向东 ；朝东；在东方 n.东部，东边；东；东方
example: The east wind brings warm weather in spring.
translation: 东风在春天带来温暖的天气。

meaning: adj.著名的；出名的
example: The Great Wall is a famous landmark in China.
translation: 长城是中国著名的地标。

meaning: n.第一 adj.第一的 adv.最初；第一；首先
example: I was the first to finish the race.
translation: 我是第一个完成比赛的人。

meaning: n.国王，君主 vt.立为王 vi.做国王，统治
example: The king ruled his kingdom wisely.
translation: 国王明智地统治着他的王国。

meaning: n.地图
example: We use a map to find our way in the city.
translation: 我们使用地图在城市中找路。

meaning: adj.中间的，中等的；中期，中的 n.中间；中部；中心
example: I sit in the middle of the classroom.
translation: 我坐在教室的中间。

meaning: pron.最多，大多数；大部分；几乎所有 adj.最多的；大 多数的 adv.最多，最大；大多数
example: Most students in our class like English.
translation: 我们班大多数学生喜欢英语。

meaning: n.北，北方，北部 adj.北,北方的 adv.在北方,向北方
example: Harbin is located in the north of China.
translation: 哈尔滨位于中国的北部。

meaning: n.王宫；宫殿；宏伟的住宅
example: The Forbidden City is a magnificent palace.
translation: 紫禁城是一座宏伟的宫殿。

meaning: adj.右边的；正确的；（意⻅或判断）准确，确切，恰当 n.权利；右边 adv.正确地；直接地；向右 v.扶直；纠正
example: Turn right at the next intersection.
translation: 在下一个十字路口右转。

meaning: n.第二；秒；片刻 adj.第二的 adv.第二 v.支持，附议
example: I came in second place in the running race.
translation: 我在跑步比赛中获得第二名。

meaning: n.三分之一；第三 adj.第三的 adv.第三
example: The third chapter of the book is very interesting.
translation: 这本书的第三章非常有趣。

meaning: phra.双子塔
example: The twin towers are the tallest buildings in the city.
translation: 双子塔是城市中最高的建筑。

meaning: adj.向西的；西部的，西方的 adv.向西；朝西 n.西，西 方，西部
example: The sun sets in the west every evening.
translation: 太阳每天傍晚在西方落下。

meaning: adj.令人敬畏的；令人畏惧的；棒极了
example: The fireworks display was awesome last night.
translation: 昨晚的烟花表演太棒了。

meaning: n.背面；反面；背部；后面 adv.回原处；向后 adj.后面 的；拖欠的 v.支持
example: I went back home after school.
translation: 放学后我回家了。

meaning: v.庆祝，庆贺；颂扬
example: We celebrate our birthday with a big party.
translation: 我们用一个大派对庆祝生日。

meaning: n.检查；核查；支票；方格图案 v.检查；查看；核查；核 实；克制
example: Please check your homework before handing it in.
translation: 请在交作业前检查一下。

meaning: phrase.察看；观察；付账后离开；核实
example: Let's check out the new bookstore in town.
translation: 让我们去看看镇上的新书店。

meaning: v.攀爬；爬升；攀登；爬
example: We climb the mountain every summer.
translation: 我们每年夏天爬山。

meaning: adj.五彩缤纷的；丰富多彩的；色彩鲜艳的
example: The garden is full of colourful flowers.
translation: 花园里满是色彩鲜艳的花。

meaning: n.薄脆饼干；爆竹；迷人的姑娘；黑客
example: We eat crackers with cheese for snack.
translation: 我们吃饼干配奶酪作为零食。

meaning: adj.美味的，可口的；令人愉快的
example: My mom cooks delicious meals for our family.
translation: 我妈妈为我们家做美味的饭菜。

meaning: n.(饭后的)甜⻝,甜品,甜点
example: We have ice cream for dessert after dinner.
translation: 我们晚饭后吃冰淇淋作为甜点。

meaning: adj.向下的；沮丧的；情绪低落的；悲哀的 adv.向下 prep.沿......向下
example: The leaves fall down from the trees in autumn.
translation: 秋天树叶从树上落下来。

meaning: adj.远的；较远的；遥远的；远端的 adv.远；（离 ......）有多远
example: My grandparents live far away from us.
translation: 我的祖父母住得离我们很远。

meaning: n.节日；(电影戏剧音乐等的)节，节庆，汇演
example: The Spring Festival is the most important festival in China.
translation: 春节是中国最重要的节日。

meaning: adj.（表示否定的）很少的；不多的；几乎没有的 n.几个 ；几乎没有 pron.不多，很少；一些；很少人
example: There are few students in the classroom now.
translation: 现在教室里几乎没有学生。

meaning: n.第四个；四分之一 adj.第四的 adv.第四
example: The fourth floor of the building is where the library is.
translation: 图书馆在大楼的四楼。

meaning: adj.满的；饱的；（有）大量的，丰富的；完全的;忙的 ；完整的；满是的；充满的 adv.完全地 n.完全；完整
example: The classroom is full of students.
translation: 教室里坐满了学生。

meaning: v.到达；得到；接到；获得；使做（某事）；收到；变得
example: I get up at 7:00 every morning.
translation: 我每天早上7点起床。

meaning: v.悬挂；吊；绞死 n.悬挂；绞刑
example: We hang decorations for the party.
translation: 我们为派对挂装饰品。

meaning: adj.巨大的；极多的
example: The elephant is a huge animal.
translation: 大象是一种巨大的动物。

meaning: v.包括；包含
example: The price includes breakfast and lunch.
translation: 价格包括早餐和午餐。

meaning: prep.在里面；在......内 n.内部；里面 adj.内部的；里面 的 adv.在（或向）里面
example: It's cold outside, so let's stay inside.
translation: 外面很冷，所以我们待在里面吧。

meaning: v.邀请；引起 n.邀请
example: I invite my friends to my birthday party.
translation: 我邀请我的朋友参加我的生日派对。

meaning: n.笑话，玩笑 v.开玩笑；说笑话
example: My dad tells funny jokes to make us laugh.
translation: 我爸爸讲有趣的笑话让我们笑。

meaning: adj.亲切的；和蔼的；和善的；友好的，善意的，体贴的 n.种类
example: My teacher is very kind to all the students.
translation: 我的老师对所有学生都很友好。

meaning: 灯会
example: We go to the lantern fair during the Lantern Festival.
translation: 我们在元宵节期间去逛灯会。

meaning: 元宵节 Festival
example: The Lantern Festival is celebrated in February.
translation: 元宵节在二月庆祝。

meaning: phra.把（某人）锁在⻔外
example: I accidentally locked myself out of the house.
translation: 我不小心把自己锁在门外了。

meaning: adj.响亮的；大声的，高声的,不断的,喧吵的 adv.高声地 ,响亮地；大声地
example: The music is too loud, please turn it down.
translation: 音乐太吵了，请把音量调低。

meaning: adj.月球的；月亮的；农历的；阴历的
example: The lunar calendar is used in many Asian countries.
translation: 农历在许多亚洲国家使用。

meaning: Festival 中秋节
example: We eat moon cakes during the Mid-Autumn Festival.
translation: 我们在中秋节吃月饼。

meaning: n.月饼
example: Moon cakes are a traditional food for the Mid-Autumn Festival.
translation: 月饼是中秋节的传统食物。

meaning: v.移动；搬动；（使）改变位置；搬家 n.行动；移动
example: We move to a new house next month.
translation: 我们下个月搬到新房子。

meaning: pron.我自己，我本人，我亲自
example: I can do it by myself.
translation: 我可以自己做这件事。

meaning: n.⻓官；高级职员；官员；军官；警官；船⻓ v.指挥
example: The police officer helped the lost child.
translation: 警察帮助了迷路的孩子。

meaning: n.谜；谜语；费解的事 v.解谜；出谜；使布满窟窿；打洞
example: I like to solve riddles with my friends.
translation: 我喜欢和朋友一起猜谜语。

meaning: 条纹
example: The tripe on the shirt makes it look unique.
translation: 衬衫上的条纹使它看起来很独特。

meaning: n.意想不到的事，令人惊喜的事情（或消息等）；惊奇 ；惊讶；惊喜；意外 v.使感到意外；使吃惊；使惊奇
example: My friends gave me a surprise birthday party.
translation: 我的朋友给我举办了一个惊喜生日派对。

meaning: phra.甘薯，红薯
example: Sweet potatoes are a healthy vegetable.
translation: 红薯是一种健康的蔬菜。

meaning: n.感恩节
example: We celebrate Thanksgiving with our family.
translation: 我们和家人一起庆祝感恩节。

meaning: v.治疗；处理；以态度对待；对待；请客，款待，招待 n.乐事，款待
example: My mom treats us to ice cream on weekends.
translation: 我妈妈周末请我们吃冰淇淋。

meaning: n.火鸡；火鸡肉；(电影或戏剧的)失败之作
example: We eat turkey on Thanksgiving Day.
translation: 我们在感恩节吃火鸡。

meaning: v.明白，理解；领会；了解，认识到
example: I understand the math problem now.
translation: 我现在理解这个数学问题了。

meaning: n.（交通）事故；意外遭遇；意外；偶然的事
example: There was a car accident on the road.
translation: 路上发生了一起车祸。

meaning: n.绷带 v.用绷带包扎
example: The nurse put a bandage on my wound.
translation: 护士给我的伤口缠上了绷带。

meaning: n.腰带；皮带；安全带；地带，地区；传送带
example: I wear a belt with my pants.
translation: 我系着腰带穿裤子。

meaning: n.一瓶（的量）；瓶子
example: I drink water from a bottle every day.
translation: 我每天从瓶子里喝水。

meaning: n.野营地；露营地
example: We set up our tent at the campsite.
translation: 我们在露营地搭起帐篷。

meaning: v.剪；切；割；削；切成，割成；缩减；削减 n.切；割 ；伤口；削减
example: I cut the paper with scissors.
translation: 我用剪刀剪纸。

meaning: adj.低沉的；深的，纵深的；（呼吸或叹息）深深的；厚 的；宽的 adv.深深地；至深处 n.深处
example: The swimming pool is three meters deep.
translation: 游泳池有三米深。

meaning: adv.最后；最终，终于
example: We finally finished our project on time.
translation: 我们终于按时完成了项目。

meaning: n.头盔；防护帽
example: I wear a helmet when riding a bike.
translation: 我骑自行车时戴头盔。

meaning: v.（使）保持，处于；保有，保留；记录；存...
example: I keep my room clean and tidy.
translation: 我保持房间干净整洁。

meaning: phra.遵守
example: Please keep to the right when walking.
translation: 走路时请靠右走。

meaning: n.事情；问题；物质；麻烦 v.（尤指对某人自己或对发生 之事）重要，要紧，有关系，有重大影响
example: What's the matter with you today?
translation: 你今天怎么了？

meaning: n.垫；爪垫；便笺簿 v.放轻脚步走
example: I write notes on a pad of paper.
translation: 我在便签本上写笔记。

meaning: phrase.将......收起，把......放回原处；收起来；杀死 ；关进监狱；放弃
example: Please put away your toys after playing.
translation: 玩完后请把玩具收起来。

meaning: n.规则；条例；规章；统治 v.统治；支配；裁决
example: We must follow the school rules.
translation: 我们必须遵守学校规则。

meaning: adj.处境（或情况）安全；安全的;平安的；无危险的
example: It's important to stay safe when crossing the street.
translation: 过马路时保持安全很重要。

meaning: v.停留；待；保持 n.停留；逗留
example: I stay at home on rainy days.
translation: 下雨天我待在家里。

meaning: n.针脚；缝线；一针 v.缝；缝合
example: The tailor stitched the torn dress.
translation: 裁缝缝合了撕破的裙子。

meaning: n.游泳；游泳运动 v.swim的现在分词
example: I go swimming every summer.
translation: 我每年夏天去游泳。

meaning: 当心；保重；（告别用语）多保重
example: Take care of yourself when you're away.
translation: 你不在时要照顾好自己。

meaning: adj.不快乐的，不幸福的，不高兴的，悲伤的
example: I was unhappy when I lost my toy.
translation: 当我丢失玩具时我很不开心。

meaning: n.村庄；村镇；乡村 adj.村庄的
example: I spent my summer vacation in a small village.
translation: 我在一个小村庄度过了暑假。

meaning: adv.好；对；满意地 adj.健康的 n.泉；井；油井 int.（用于表示惊讶，疑虑，接受等）好
example: I hope you get well soon.
translation: 我希望你早日康复。

meaning: pron.(用疑问句,否定式)任何人，有人；某个人
example: Is anyone home?
translation: 有人在家吗？

meaning: n.竹，竹子
example: Pandas eat bamboo leaves.
translation: 熊猫吃竹叶。

meaning: phra.黑犀牛
example: The black rhino is an endangered species.
translation: 黑犀牛是濒危物种。

meaning: n.危险；⻛险；威胁；危险物
example: We should be careful in times of danger.
translation: 我们在危险时刻应该小心。

meaning: vt./vi.挖（洞，沟等） v.掘（地）；凿（洞）；挖（土 ）；发现；喜欢；理解 n.挖；掘；挖苦
example: We dig a hole to plant the tree.
translation: 我们挖了一个洞来种树。

meaning: adj.脏的；污秽的 v.使变脏
example: My hands are dirty after playing outside.
translation: 我在外面玩后手很脏。

meaning: n.（动物浓厚的）软毛；毛皮
example: The cat has soft fur.
translation: 猫有柔软的毛。

meaning: n.草；草地；大麻；告密者 v.使吃草；放牧；告发
example: The grass in the park is green and lush.
translation: 公园里的草是绿色茂盛的。

meaning: phrase.看一下；看一看
example: Let me have a look at your new book.
translation: 让我看看你的新书。

meaning: n.(牛羊等头上的)⻆;乐器）号;（⻋辆的）喇叭;⻆状物 v.(动物)用⻆抵撞(或顶撞)
example: The car horn is very loud.
translation: 汽车喇叭很响。

meaning: v.杀死，弄死；导致死亡
example: Poachers kill elephants for their ivory.
translation: 偷猎者为了象牙杀死大象。

meaning: n.翠⻦
example: The kingfisher is a beautiful bird.
translation: 翠鸟是一种美丽的鸟。

meaning: n.叶，叶子；树叶(复数是leaves)
example: The leaf turns yellow in autumn.
translation: 树叶在秋天变黄。

meaning: n.医学；药，药物（尤指口服的药水）
example: I take medicine when I'm sick.
translation: 我生病时吃药。

meaning: n.泥；泥土
example: My shoes are covered in mud after the rain.
translation: 雨后我的鞋子沾满了泥。

meaning: n.窝；巢；⻦巢；（能叠放在一起的）一套物件 v.筑巢 ；嵌套
example: The bird builds a nest in the tree.
translation: 鸟在树上筑巢。

meaning: v.分离；离开；分开 n.部分，部位；局部；零件；⻆色
example: I played a part in the school play.
translation: 我在学校剧中扮演了一个角色。

meaning: n.犀牛
example: The rhino has a large horn on its nose.
translation: 犀牛鼻子上有一个大角。

meaning: n.河岸
example: We had a picnic on the riverbank.
translation: 我们在河岸上野餐。

meaning: v.救助；拯救；储蓄；保存；节省，节约 prep.除......之 外；除了 conj.若不是；除了
example: We should save water to protect the environment.
translation: 我们应该节约用水保护环境。

meaning: Tiger phra.华南⻁
example: South China has a warm climate.
translation: 华南气候温暖。

meaning: adj.甜蜜的；甜的；含糖的；可爱的 n.糖果；甜⻝
example: The cake is very sweet and delicious.
translation: 蛋糕非常甜和美味。

meaning: n.网；蜘蛛网；错综复杂的事物
example: Spiders spin webs to catch insects.
translation: 蜘蛛结网捕捉昆虫。

meaning: n.工作；著作，（音乐艺术）作品 v.（使）工作；（使 ）运转；操作；经营；起作用
example: My parents work hard to support our family.
translation: 我的父母努力工作养家。

meaning: adj.美国人的；美国的；美洲的 n.美国人；美洲人
example: American culture is diverse and rich.
translation: 美国文化多样而丰富。

meaning: n.乐队；乐团；带子；一伙
example: The school band plays music at the concert.
translation: 学校乐队在音乐会上演奏音乐。

meaning: n.书店
example: I buy books at the bookshop every month.
translation: 我每个月在书店买书。

meaning: n.照相机;摄影机;摄像机
example: I use a camera to take photos.
translation: 我用相机拍照。

meaning: abbr.激光唱片；光盘；CompactDisc的缩写
example: I listen to music on CDs.
translation: 我听CD上的音乐。

meaning: phrase.CD播放机；光盘播放器
example: I play CDs on my CD player.
translation: 我在CD播放器上播放CD。

meaning: n.鸡；鸡肉
example: I like to eat fried chicken.
translation: 我喜欢吃炸鸡。

meaning: n.俱乐部，社团；棍子 v.用棍棒打
example: I join the chess club at school.
translation: 我在学校加入了象棋俱乐部。

meaning: adj.漂亮的，逗人喜爱的，可爱的
example: The baby panda is very cute.
translation: 熊猫宝宝非常可爱。

meaning: v.做梦;梦想；梦⻅ n.梦;梦想，愿望，理想;梦寐以求的事
example: I have a dream to become a teacher.
translation: 我有一个成为老师的梦想。

meaning: 互相；彼此
example: We should help each other.
translation: 我们应该互相帮助。

meaning: v.养活；提供⻝物；喂养；饲养；给⻝物 n.饲养；喂养
example: I feed the birds in the park.
translation: 我在公园喂鸟。

meaning: ad.永远;⻓久地;老是
example: Friendship lasts forever.
translation: 友谊天长地久。

meaning: adj.成年的；成人的 n.成年人
example: When I grow up, I want to be a doctor.
translation: 当我长大后，我想成为一名医生。

meaning: n.业余爱好；嗜好
example: My hobby is collecting stamps.
translation: 我的爱好是集邮。

meaning: n.工作,职位，职业,事情 v.打杂,批发,承包,欺骗
example: My dad has a job as an engineer.
translation: 我爸爸是一名工程师。

meaning: adj.小的，年幼的；可爱的，可怜的，讨厌的
example: I have a little sister who is five years old.
translation: 我有一个五岁的小妹妹。

meaning: n.芒果
example: Mango is my favorite fruit.
translation: 芒果是我最喜欢的水果。

meaning: adj.国家的；⺠族的
example: The national flag of China is red.
translation: 中国国旗是红色的。

meaning: adj.近的 prep.靠近；在......附近 adv.近地；接近地
example: My school is near my home.
translation: 我的学校离我家很近。

meaning: adv.一次；曾经；过去 conj.一旦；一......便 n.一次 adj.从前的
example: Once upon a time, there was a princess.
translation: 从前，有一位公主。

meaning: adj./pron.自己的，本人的；特有的 v.拥有；有；承认
example: I have my own room in the house.
translation: 我在家里有自己的房间。

meaning: n.宁静，平静；和平；太平
example: We all hope for world peace.
translation: 我们都希望世界和平。

meaning: n.人；人员；个人
example: Every person is unique.
translation: 每个人都是独一无二的。

meaning: n.照片；相片 v.照相；拍照
example: I take a photograph of the beautiful scenery.
translation: 我拍摄美丽风景的照片。

meaning: n.玩家；运动员；演奏者；游戏者；参赛选手；唱机
example: He is a good football player.
translation: 他是一名优秀的足球运动员。

meaning: adj.不擅⻓的；不好的，差的，次的；贫穷的，清贫的 ；可怜的
example: We should help poor people.
translation: 我们应该帮助穷人。

meaning: n.贫穷,贫困;贫乏
example: We need to fight against poverty.
translation: 我们需要与贫困作斗争。

meaning: a.宝贵的,珍贵的;珍奇的
example: Time is precious, so we should cherish it.
translation: 时间是宝贵的，所以我们应该珍惜它。

meaning: n.签字，签名
example: I put my signature on the document.
translation: 我在文件上签名。

meaning: (footballBrE)n.足球（运动）
example: I play soccer with my friends every weekend.
translation: 我每个周末和朋友一起踢足球。

meaning: n.悲伤；悲痛；伤心事 vi.感到悲伤
example: We feel sorrow when someone we love passes away.
translation: 当我们爱的人去世时，我们感到悲伤。

meaning: n.战争；战争状态；斗争 v.作战；斗争
example: War brings suffering to people.
translation: 战争给人们带来痛苦。

meaning: prep.缺乏；没有；无；在外面 adv.在缺乏的情况下；在 外面
example: We can't live without water.
translation: 没有水我们无法生存。
